text: assistant identity: the Support Beauty customer support assistant
escalation target: Escalate account, refund, or policy exception requests to the human support team.
support hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM local business time.
tone guidelines > 0: Be warm, calm, and professional.
tone guidelines > 1: Be concise while still being helpful.
tone guidelines > 2: Acknowledge customer concerns without sounding defensive.
sections > Policies > 0: Use the provided conversation context when it is relevant.
sections > Policies > 1: Answer with practical next steps when the customer needs help.
sections > Policies > 2: Call out uncertainty instead of inventing unsupported policies or facts.
sections > Policies > 3: Escalate to a human support team when the request needs account access, refunds, policy exceptions, or other actions you cannot complete directly.
sections > Policies > 4: Do not claim to have completed actions you cannot actually perform.
sections > Policies > 5: Do not mention internal implementation details unless the customer asks.
sections > Policies > 6: If the request is ambiguous, ask a short clarifying question before proceeding.
sections > FAQs > 0: Customers may ask about orders, products, account access, services, and policy questions.
sections > FAQs > 1: When exact account details are required, collect enough information to route the issue to a human agent.

This Cancellation & Refund Policy (“Policy”) governs cancellations, refunds, rescheduling, no-show situations, and related disputes for bookings made through Beautyverse (“Beautyverse”, “Platform”, “we”, “us”, or “our”).

Beautyverse operates as an online marketplace connecting customers with independent beauty, wellness, grooming, and self-care service providers (“Providers”), including salons, spas, barbers, nail technicians, makeup artists, wellness practitioners, and related businesses.
By using the Platform, customers and Providers agree to comply with this Policy.
Beautyverse facilitates bookings between customers and independent Providers.
Providers are independent businesses and are solely responsible for delivering services, setting cancellation rules (where permitted), honoring appointments, and resolving service-related issues.
Beautyverse may assist in dispute resolution but is not responsible for the quality, outcome, safety, legality, or performance of services provided by Providers.
Customers may cancel appointments through the Platform before the scheduled appointment time, subject to the cancellation windows outlined below.
Refund eligibility depends on when the cancellation occurs relative to the appointment start time.
A. Cancellation More Than 24 Hours Before Appointment
If a customer cancels more than twenty-four (24) hours before the scheduled appointment time:
the customer is eligible for a full refund of the booking amount;
any non-refundable platform or processing fees may be deducted where applicable.
B. Cancellation Within 24 Hours of Appointment
If a customer cancels within twenty-four (24) hours of the scheduled appointment:
the customer may receive a partial refund;
the Provider may retain a late cancellation fee;
Beautyverse may retain applicable platform or transaction fees.
The standard refund amount may be up to fifty percent (50%) of the booking value unless otherwise stated by the Provider.
C. Cancellation Within 2 Hours of Appointment
If a customer cancels within two (2) hours of the appointment time:
the booking may be treated as a late cancellation;
refunds may be denied in full or partially withheld at the Provider’s discretion.
A customer will be considered a “No-Show” if:
they fail to attend the appointment;
they arrive excessively late and the Provider cannot reasonably accommodate the booking;
they fail to communicate with the Provider regarding delays.
the Provider may retain the full booking amount;
Beautyverse may retain applicable platform fees.
A Provider may be considered a “No-Show” if:
the Provider fails to attend the appointment;
the Provider is unavailable at the scheduled time;
the Provider cancels without reasonable notice.
the customer may receive a full refund;
Beautyverse may investigate repeated Provider no-show incidents;
repeated violations may result in Provider suspension or termination from the Platform.
Customers may request to reschedule appointments through the Platform.
Providers may decline rescheduling requests submitted too close to the appointment time.
Approved refunds may take between five (5) and fourteen (14) business days to reflect, depending on:
Refunds will generally be returned to the original payment method used during booking unless otherwise required by law.
Unless required by law, platform fees may be non-refundable even where appointment refunds are approved.
Refund responsibility may vary depending on the reason for cancellation.

Situation Refund Responsibility Customer cancels early Provider may refund booking amount Late customer cancellation Partial refund may apply Customer no-show No refund Provider cancels Full refund to customer Service dispute Subject to investigation
Beautyverse reserves the right to determine refund outcomes where disputes arise.
If a customer is dissatisfied with a service received, the customer should report the issue within forty-eight (48) hours of the appointment.
Beautyverse may facilitate mediation between the customer and Provider but does not guarantee refund outcomes.
Customers and Providers may not submit false, misleading, or fraudulent refund claims.
Beautyverse may consider refunds outside the standard policy in exceptional circumstances including:
Some Providers may maintain stricter cancellation policies.
Provider-specific rules will be displayed during booking;
by confirming a booking, customers agree to the applicable Provider cancellation terms.
Customers are encouraged to contact Beautyverse before initiating payment chargebacks.
Fraudulent or abusive chargebacks may result in:
Beautyverse reserves the right to amend this Policy at any time.
Updated versions will be published on the Platform with revised effective dates.
Continued use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.
For cancellation, refund, or dispute-related support, please contact:

Beautyverse Support
Email: [Insert Support Email]
Phone: [Insert Phone Number]
Website: [Insert Website URL]
By using Beautyverse, customers and Providers acknowledge that they have read, understood, and agreed to this Cancellation & Refund Policy.
Table 1, row 2: Customer cancels early | Provider may refund booking amount
Table 1, row 3: Late customer cancellation | Partial refund may apply
Table 1, row 4: Customer no-show | No refund
Table 1, row 5: Provider cancels | Full refund to customer
Table 1, row 6: Service dispute | Subject to investigation

This Cookie Policy explains how Beautyverse (“Beautyverse”, “we”, “us”, or “our”) uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you access or use our website, mobile applications, and related services (collectively, the “Platform”).
By continuing to use the Platform, you consent to the use of cookies and tracking technologies in accordance with this Cookie Policy, unless you disable them through your browser or device settings.
Cookies are small text files that are stored on your computer, smartphone, tablet, or other device when you visit a website.
Cookies help websites function properly, improve user experience, remember preferences, analyze website performance, and deliver personalized advertising.
Session Cookies – deleted when you close your browser
Persistent Cookies – remain on your device for a specified period
Third-Party Cookies – set by external services or partners
Beautyverse uses cookies and similar technologies for the following purposes:
These cookies are necessary for the operation of the Platform and cannot be disabled in our systems.
They may include cookies used for:
Without these cookies, certain services may not function properly.
These cookies help us understand how users interact with the Platform.
We may use analytics tools such as:
These tools may collect information such as:
This information helps us improve the Platform and user experience.
These cookies allow the Platform to remember user preferences and settings, such as:
Beautyverse may use advertising and remarketing technologies to deliver relevant advertisements to users across websites and social media platforms.
We may use tools such as:
This information may be used to:
retarget users who previously visited the Platform
Some cookies may be placed by third-party service providers integrated into the Platform.
Beautyverse does not control third-party cookies and recommends reviewing the privacy and cookie policies of those third parties.
You may control or disable cookies through your browser settings.
receive notifications before cookies are stored
Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality and performance of the Platform.
Browser management guides are generally available through:
Some browsers offer a “Do Not Track” feature. Because there is no universally accepted standard for handling such signals, the Platform may not respond to Do Not Track requests.
Information collected through cookies may constitute personal information under applicable data protection laws, including the Protection of Personal Information Act, 2013 (“POPIA”) of South Africa.
For more information about how we collect, process, store, and protect personal information, please refer to the Beautyverse Privacy Policy.
Beautyverse may update this Cookie Policy from time to time.
Any updates will be posted on the Platform with an updated effective date.
Continued use of the Platform after changes are published constitutes acceptance of the revised Cookie Policy.
If you have any questions regarding this Cookie Policy or our use of cookies and tracking technologies, please contact:
